revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月1日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 1일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月初一]][[zh:十二月初一]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 1|qq=December 1}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 1''' is the 1st day of the month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}}, the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}}. == Events == * {{ill|Xiang Yu|en|Xiang Yu|qid=Q182266|lt=Xiang Yu|1=Xiang Yu}}'s 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|201 BC|ja|紀元前201|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/201 BC|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{ill|January 16|en|January 16|qid=Q2261|lt=January 16|1=January 16}}) – {{ill|Battle of Gaixia|en|Battle of Gaixia|qid=Q1349891|lt=Battle of Gaixia|1=Battle of Gaixia}}. In this historic event, {{ill|Chu|ja|楚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chu|1=Chu (state)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q398797}} leader {{ill|Xiang Yu|en|Xiang Yu|qid=Q182266|lt=Xiang Yu|1=Xiang Yu}} was besieged by the {{ill|Han dynasty|en|Han dynasty|qid=Q7209|lt=Han|1=Han dynasty}} army; despairing after hearing songs of Chu from the enemy camp, he committed suicide—giving rise to the idiom {{ill|Si Mian Chu Ge|ja|四面楚歌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Si Mian Chu Ge|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 垓下の戦い|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 垓下の戦い|1=Battle of Gaixia|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1349891}}. * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|en|Tenpyō-hōji|qid=Q1346307|lt=Tenpyō-hōji|1=Tenpyō-hōji}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|762|en|762|qid=Q30324|lt=762|1=762}} {{ill|December 20|en|December 20|qid=Q2455|lt=December 20|1=December 20}}) – The {{ill|Taga-johi|ja|多賀城碑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taga-johi|1=Tagajō Stele|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11431070}} was erected. * {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun|1=Tenmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q21096812}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1538|en|1538|qid=Q6470|lt=1538|1=1538}} {{ill|January 1|en|January 1|qid=Q2150|lt=January 1|1=January 1}}) – {{ill|Mōri Motonari|en|Mōri Motonari|qid=Q1156545|lt=Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari}} sent his legitimate son ({{ill|Chakunan|ja|嫡男|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chakunan|1=eldest Di son|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10102290}}), {{ill|Takamoto|ja|隆元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, as a hostage to {{ill|Ōuchi Yoshitaka|en|Ōuchi Yoshitaka|qid=Q1065163|lt=Ōuchi Yoshitaka|1=Ōuchi Yoshitaka}}. * {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|qid=Q1146221|lt=Jōkyō|1=Jōkyō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1685|en|1685|qid=Q7660|lt=1685|1=1685}} {{ill|January 5|en|January 5|qid=Q2202|lt=January 5|1=January 5}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} established the {{ill|Tenmongata|en|Tenmongata|qid=Q11442660|lt=Tenmon-kata|1=Tenmongata}}; for his contribution to the creation of the {{ill|Jōkyō calendar|en|Jōkyō calendar|qid=Q2353004|lt=Jōkyō-reki|1=Jōkyō calendar}}, Shibukawa Harumi ({{ill|Shibukawa Shunkai|en|Shibukawa Shunkai|qid=Q786877|lt=Shibukawa Harumi|1=Shibukawa Shunkai}}) was appointed. * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1798|en|1798|qid=Q7823|lt=1798|1=1798}} {{ill|January 17|en|January 17|qid=Q2264|lt=January 17|1=January 17}}) – The management of {{ill|Yushima Seidō|en|Yushima Seidō|qid=Q1760591|lt=Yushima Seidō|1=Yushima Seidō}} was transferred from the Hayashi family to the bakufu, and it was renamed as the {{ill|Shōheizaka Gakumonjo|ja|昌平坂学問所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōheizaka Gakumonjo|1=Shoheizaka Academy|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q4059219}}. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 4th year (1858, 1月15日) – A scholar from the Nanbu Domain, {{ill|Ōshima Takatō|en|Ōshima Takatō|qid=Q3594050|lt=Ōshima Takakimin|1=Ōshima Takatō}}, became the first in Japan to successfully smelt iron using the blast furnace method.
== Births == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|qid=Q1010103|lt=Bun'ei|1=Bun'ei}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1267|en|1267|qid=Q5519|lt=1267|1=1267}} {{ill|December 17|en|December 17|qid=Q2413|lt=December 17|1=December 17}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Uda|en|Emperor Go-Uda|qid=Q440538|lt=Gō Uda Tennō|1=Emperor Go-Uda}}, the 91st {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (died {{ill|1324|en|1324|qid=Q5773|lt=1324|1=1324}}). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1573|en|1573|qid=Q6678|lt=1573|1=1573}} {{ill|December 24|en|December 24|qid=Q2705|lt=December 24|1=December 24}}) – {{ill|Takuan Sōhō|en|Takuan Sōhō|qid=Q632866|lt=Zawan Sōhō|1=Takuan Sōhō}}, a monk of the {{ill|Rinzai school|en|Rinzai school|qid=Q639625|lt=Rinzai Zen|1=Rinzai school}} (died {{ill|1645|en|1645|qid=Q6925|lt=1645|1=1645}}). * {{ill|Genbun|en|Genbun|qid=Q1145754|lt=Genbun|1=Genbun}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1738|en|1738|qid=Q6996|lt=1738|1=1738}} {{ill|January 20|en|January 20|qid=Q2267|lt=January 20|1=January 20}}) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshitō|ja|松平義当|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Yoshitō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 松平勝当|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 松平勝当}}, head of the {{ill|Takasu Domain|en|Takasu Domain|qid=Q3034539|lt=Takasu Domain|1=Takasu Domain}} (died {{ill|1801|en|1801|qid=Q6877|lt=1801|1=1801}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1851|en|1851|qid=Q7656|lt=1851|1=1851}} {{ill|January 2|en|January 2|qid=Q2151|lt=January 2|1=January 2}}) – {{ill|Yano Ryūkai|ja|矢野龍渓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yano Ryūkai|1=Yano Ryūkei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q7400128}}, a journalist and writer (died {{ill|1931|en|1931|qid=Q18782|lt=1931|1=1931}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} {{ill|January 15|en|January 15|qid=Q2260|lt=January 15|1=January 15}}) – {{ill|Uemura Masahisa|en|Uemura Masahisa|qid=Q5966773|lt=Uemura Masahisa|1=Uemura Masahisa}}, a pastor and evangelist (died {{ill|1925|en|1925|qid=Q18107|lt=1925|1=1925}}). * 安政4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1858, 1月15日) – {{ill|Kakichi Mitsukuri|en|Kakichi Mitsukuri|qid=Q2740750|lt=Minasaku Yoshikichi|1=Kakichi Mitsukuri}}, an animal scientist (died {{ill|1909|en|1909|qid=Q2057|lt=1909|1=1909}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|qid=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}} {{ill|January 17|en|January 17|qid=Q2264|lt=January 17|1=January 17}}) – {{ill|Kōjirō Matsukata|en|Kōjirō Matsukata|qid=Q714260|lt=Matsukata Kōjirō|1=Kōjirō Matsukata}}, a businessman and politician (died {{ill|1950|en|1950|qid=Q18597|lt=1950|1=1950}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|January 6|en|January 6|qid=Q2221|lt=January 6|1=January 6}}) – {{ill|Tokonami Takejirō|en|Tokonami Takejirō|qid=Q2690209|lt=Tokoro Tsakenjirō|1=Tokonami Takejirō}}, a politician (died {{ill|1935|en|1935|qid=Q18658|lt=1935|1=1935}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|qid=Q1010103|lt=Bunka|1=Bun'ei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1807|en|1807|qid=Q6909|lt=1807|1=1807}} {{ill|December 29|en|December 29|qid=Q2862|lt=December 29|1=December 29}}) – {{ill|Shibano Kuriyama|ja|柴野栗山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shibano Kuriyama|1=Shibano Ritsuzan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6563041}}, a scholar of Zhu Xi (born {{ill|1736|en|1736|qid=Q6989|lt=1736|1=1736}}). == Fictional Events == === Births === * {{ill|Chōroku|en|Chōroku|qid=Q1193524|lt=Chōroku|1=Chōroku}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1459|en|1459|qid=Q6524|lt=1459|1=1459}} {{ill|December 26|en|December 26|qid=Q2761|lt=December 26|1=December 26}}) – A character named Inukawa Sōsuke Yoshinori (額蔵) who appears in the reading of {{ill|Nansō Satomi Hakkenden|en|Nansō Satomi Hakkenden|qid=Q557852|lt=Nansō Satomi Hakkenden|1=Nansō Satomi Hakkenden}}. == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|30|12|2|11|1|1|12|1201|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|12月1日 (旧暦)|version=93848060|comment=I know this is supposed to go on the talk page but I am not using talk pages here, this and afc comments are how I keep track of things}}
[[cdo:12 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:December 1 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 12월 1일]] [[ja:12月1日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十二月初一]]
[[ar:December 1 (Lunisolar)]]
